response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, aligning with the required AI agent development skill. His work with Vitest-equivalent testing (TDD, CI/CD, custom test runners) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is well-documented. He has used PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB and contributed to architecture decisions across multiple enterprises. His open-source projects and workshops demonstrate strong communication, collaboration, and process improvement — key for an IC in an internal tooling org. His degree in CS satisfies the education requirement. Minor gaps: no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest (though he uses equivalent tools), and German is only basic, but not critical for an engineering role in Berlin with English fluency.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent infrastructure development and experience with MCP code generators
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, containerization, and developer tooling
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalent frameworks used)
German language skill is only basic, may limit internal stakeholder communication
Extensive use of DLang and niche tools may indicate over-diversification or lack of stack focus
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with deep full-stack expertise, proven AI-agent work, and strong engineering practices. His experience with internal tooling, cloud, testing, and architecture aligns perfectly with the role. While he lacks explicit Nest.js/Vitest exposure, his equivalent skills and demonstrable adaptability mitigate this. The minor language barrier is negligible in a tech-first environment. He is a standout candidate.
